races.name: Voidkin
races.description: Aliens, cosmic horrors, and star-touched beings.

races.name: Highborn
races.description: Humans, scholars, soldiers, and city folk.

races.name: Eldritch
races.description: Glitch entities, monitors, and uncanny minds.

races.name: Verdant
races.description: Elves, dryads, moss spirits, and forest kin.

races.name: Mythic
races.description: Angels, samurai, pharaohs, and legendary icons.

races.name: Runeborn
races.description: Golems, puppets, gargoyles, and carved forms.

races.name: Primal
races.description: Ogres, trolls, goblins, and brute tribes.
